source_pr.title: tests: move IT in `executor` to `tests/integrationtest` (PART 9)
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref #47076

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [x] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->  

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: race = "on",.
analysis:
PR title: tests: move IT in `executor` to `tests/integrationtest` (PART 9)
PR url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/48179
Triage sources: manual_triage, explicit_flaky_signal
Triage summary: race = "on",
Changed files (30): pkg/executor/stale_txn_test.go, pkg/executor/test/admintest/BUILD.bazel, pkg/executor/test/admintest/admin_test.go, pkg/executor/test/analyzetest/BUILD.bazel, pkg/executor/test/analyzetest/analyze_test.go, pkg/executor/test/autoidtest/BUILD.bazel, pkg/executor/test/autoidtest/autoid_test.go, pkg/executor/test/seqtest/BUILD.bazel, pkg/executor/test/seqtest/seq_executor_test.go, tests/integrationtest/r/executor/adapter.result, tests/integrationtest/r/executor/admin.result, tests/integrationtest/r/executor/analyze.result, tests/integrationtest/r/executor/autoid.result, tests/integrationtest/r/executor/charset.result, tests/integrationtest/r/executor/jointest/join.result, tests/integrationtest/r/executor/set.result, tests/integrationtest/r/executor/show.result, tests/integrationtest/r/executor/stale_txn.result, tests/integrationtest/r/planner/core/tests/prepare/issue.result, tests/integrationtest/run-tests.sh, tests/integrationtest/t/executor/adapter.test, tests/integrationtest/t/executor/admin.test, tests/integrationtest/t/executor/analyze.test, tests/integrationtest/t/executor/autoid.test, tests/integrationtest/t/executor/charset.test, tests/integrationtest/t/executor/jointest/join.test, tests/integrationtest/t/executor/set.test, tests/integrationtest/t/executor/show.test, tests/integrationtest/t/executor/stale_txn.test, tests/integrationtest/t/planner/core/tests/prepare/issue.test
Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
